creator: raimeetravel
caption:
Rules to follow if you want a remote job! These are all of the things I did to land my first remote role #AMDPartner 

That first remote job of mine completely changed the course of my life and allowed me to travel so much! Working from all over the world is even easier now with my @amd Ryzen AI-powered laptop!

Ask me any questions! I’ve had 4 remote jobs and love helping people get hired!!

#remotejob #remotework #traveljob

transcription.text: Here's exactly what I would do to get my first remote job. Rule number one, act remote before you're actually remote and learn how to work independently. I did all of this while I was still in an office and using an AMD laptop can help a lot. Rule number two, build proof, not just a resume. For example, I built an entire portfolio that I could showcase during job interviews. Rule number three, make your workflow portable. Having the right tools is essential. This AMD Ryzen AI powered laptop is perfect. It's lightweight, the battery lasts forever. It's perfect for working and traveling. And the final rule, you have to get comfortable being annoying. You're going to follow up with people a million times. You're going to reach out to a lot of people. You're going to go to a lot of events, but this is how you're going to get hired. Let me know any questions you have about remote work and comment AMD and I'll send you my favorite laptop for remote work.
